mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room (name, venue, row_count, col_count, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{venue}, #{rowCount}, #{colCount}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET name = #{name}, venue = #{venue}, row_count = #{rowCount}, col_count = #{colCount}, description = #{description}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, venue, row_count, col_count, description, create_time, update_time FROM room WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, venue, row_count, col_count, description, create_time, update_time FROM room ORDER BY create_time DESC
